designs.title: What is AppySentinel
designs.description: Orientation page — headless rule, three umbrellas, two pilots. First thing a new reader sees.

designs.title: Architecture Overview
designs.description: Foundation primitives → Collect/Expose/Deliver umbrellas → Operational layer. Shows system composition.

designs.title: Pattern Capability Matrix
designs.description: Pattern × app grid with status indicators (baked / recipe / future / out-of-scope).

designs.title: Recipe Catalog
designs.description: One card per recipe — name, umbrella, status, what it solves, which pilot uses it.
